subject: FILIPINO
title: Paghahambing
objective: Gumamit ng salitang naghahambing nang malinaw at patas.
introduction: Gamitin ang pareho, kapwa, mas, kaysa, at ngunit ayon sa aktuwal na katangian. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Paghahambing”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Gamitin ang pareho, kapwa, mas, kaysa, at ngunit ayon sa aktuwal na katangian.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Gamitin ang pareho, kapwa, mas, kaysa, at ngunit ayon sa aktuwal na katangian.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.

examples: Mas mahaba ang pulang laso kaysa asul.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

fits: Mas mahaba ang pulang laso kaysa asul.
doesNotFit: Ihambing ang taong may mapanlait na salita
Sabihing mas magaling nang walang batayan

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

options: Mas mahaba ang 10 cm kaysa 7 cm.
Mas mahaba ang 7 cm kaysa 10 cm.

feedback.correct: Correct: Mas mahaba ang 10 cm kaysa 7 cm.
feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. Mas mahaba ang 7 cm kaysa 10 cm. and Pareho ang 7 cm at 10 cm. do not fit.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: All choices are visible text and selectable with TalkBack.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

pairs.left: Mas mahaba ang pulang laso kaysa asul.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

options.text: Gamitin ang pareho, kapwa, mas, kaysa, at ngunit ayon sa aktuwal na katangian.
Ihambing ang taong may mapanlait na salita
Sabihing mas magaling nang walang batayan

items.explanation: The correct response is “Gamitin ang pareho, kapwa, mas, kaysa, at ngunit ayon sa aktuwal na katangian.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gamitin ang pareho, kapwa, mas, kaysa, at ngunit ayon sa aktuwal na katangian.

options.text: Ihambing ang taong may mapanlait na salita
Sabihing mas magaling nang walang batayan

items.explanation: The correct response is “Parehong bilog ang dalawang plato.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gamitin ang pareho, kapwa, mas, kaysa, at ngunit ayon sa aktuwal na katangian.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?

options.text: Ihambing ang taong may mapanlait na salita
Mas mahaba ang pulang laso kaysa asul.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Ihambing ang taong may mapanlait na salita” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gamitin ang pareho, kapwa, mas, kaysa, at ngunit ayon sa aktuwal na katangian.

options.text: Mas mahaba ang 10 cm kaysa 7 cm.
Mas mahaba ang 7 cm kaysa 10 cm.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Mas mahaba ang 10 cm kaysa 7 cm.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gamitin ang pareho, kapwa, mas, kaysa, at ngunit ayon sa aktuwal na katangian.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?

options.text: Ihambing ang taong may mapanlait na salita

items.explanation: The correct response is “Kapwa may dahon ang halaman.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gamitin ang pareho, kapwa, mas, kaysa, at ngunit ayon sa aktuwal na katangian.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Paghahambing; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Paghahambing.
